creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Paul Floyd from comment #10)
I mean, in upstream, what is the use for the strict checks?  I only see the
need to constantly update them with new FreeBSD releases.

Even if the concern is the need to handle new syscalls, it is still true
for stable branches in between, or another common situation when valgrind
is built e.g. on stable/13 but used on stable/14 etc.

I believe that you just add yourself more work.
